remarks: Fully renovated 2-bedroom corner unit in the heart of Downtown Stamford! This apartment has been meticulously redone from top to bottom: brand new kitchen, brand new full bath, new flooring throughout, and freshly painted. Bright and welcoming living room with dining alcove and an abundance of closet space. Corner exposure brings in great natural light. Kitchen features a gas range, refrigerator, microwave, and dishwasher. One assigned parking spot in the rear lot included in the rent. Coin-op laundry on site plus additional storage. Unbeatable location on a tree-lined street with a Walk Score of 77: steps to shops, restaurants, gyms, parks, and public transportation. Enjoy a fully updated unit with the convenience of downtown living. Tenant responsible for all utilities. Landlord pays HOA. Available for immediate occupancy. Schedule your showing today!
